title: Thank You Page Content

fields.label: Content Notes
fields.message: Edit all visible thank-you page copy here. Phone number and email still come from Theme Settings > Footer contact, and WhatsApp link comes from Theme Settings > Social links.

fields.label: Badge Text
fields.name: thank_you_badge_text
fields.instructions: Small label above the main thank-you heading.

fields.label: Subheading
fields.name: thank_you_subheading
fields.instructions: Short line below the main heading.
fields.default_value: We will get in touch with you shortly.

fields.label: Intro Content
fields.name: thank_you_body_content
fields.instructions: Optional supporting copy below the subheading. Leave empty to use the regular page content editor instead.

fields.label: Contact Box Text (WhatsApp + Phone)
fields.name: thank_you_contact_text_both
fields.instructions: Shown when both WhatsApp and phone are available.
fields.default_value: You can also reach us directly on WhatsApp or give us a call.

fields.label: Contact Box Text (WhatsApp Only)
fields.name: thank_you_contact_text_whatsapp
fields.instructions: Shown when only WhatsApp is available.
fields.default_value: You can also reach us directly on WhatsApp.

fields.label: Contact Box Text (Phone Only)
fields.name: thank_you_contact_text_phone
fields.instructions: Shown when only phone is available.
fields.default_value: You can also reach us directly by phone.

fields.label: Contact Box Text (Fallback)
fields.name: thank_you_contact_text_fallback
fields.instructions: Shown when neither WhatsApp nor phone is available.
fields.default_value: If you need anything else, our team is here to help.

fields.label: Email Prefix
fields.name: thank_you_email_prefix
fields.instructions: Text shown before the email address.

fields.label: Secondary Button Text
fields.name: thank_you_secondary_button_text
fields.instructions: Label for the phone call button.

fields.label: Fallback Primary Button Text
fields.name: thank_you_fallback_primary_button_text
fields.instructions: Label used when contact details are unavailable.

description: Editable content for the Thank You Page template
